overview.description: The Voya Ultra Short Income ETF (VUSI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is actively managed, aiming to provide yield and return of capital above the level of traditional cash investments. The fund invests in a diversified mix of investment grade, short-duration bonds. VUSI was launched on Nov 18, 2025 and is issued by Voya.
